---
title: "HW 4.3 Analysis"
author: "GitHub User: D8xo"
date: "2026-04-15"
format: pdf
execute:
  echo: true
---

## Introduction
This document demonstrates a simple reproducible analysis.

## Example Code

```{r}
x <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
mean(x)
```

## Conclusion
This shows a basic example of a reproducible report using Quarto.
